allowed_use_cases: draft summarization for review packet preparation
excluded_use_cases: final GO authority for risky tasks

preconditions_satisfied: review packet/queue/decision handoff artifacts are present
mock/stub validation completed for same task shape

human_approvals_recorded.note: Approved for limited scope only with hard-gate-first enforcement.

autonomous_continuation_note: Autonomous continuation remains not approved unless explicitly approved through the required governance process.
rollback_disable_expectation: If any guardrail fails, disable limited live provider use immediately and route work to REVIEW.
follow_up_actions_before_broader_live_us: Complete stronger authn and policy operations hardening
Validate rollback drills for live provider incidents
Document broadened live-use criteria with Management + Audit review
rationale: Limited scope can start under strict advisory-only and hard-gate constraints.
